ocr_findings.description: Line 21 of OCR: 'アはプロジェクトコストマジメント' — image clearly shows 'コストマネジメント' (ネ is missing, rendering 'マジメント' instead of 'マネジメント'). Meaning is changed.
The hexagonal communication-path diagram (6-node graph) is replaced with img-0.jpeg reference — diagram content not transcribed, but this is expected OCR behavior for figures.

reviewer_notes: Page contains answer explanations for exam questions 7-4 through 7-9 with solution text and one mathematical diagram. Label 'exam' is correct per brief rules (answer/explanation pages count as exam). The マネジメント→マジメント substitution is the only substantive error.
